rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM I. BERNELL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And To Confirm Trust Assets.
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised to remove item #1. As noted in the revised Examiner's notes, the request to confirm petitioners as successor co-trustees was not in the prayer, so it cannot be in the order, however, this court can order the property is a trust asset subject to the management and control of the petitioners as successor co-trustees.
